Review Layerpath?

Layerpath is praised for its simplicity and effectiveness in creating interactive demos, walkthroughs, and guides. Users appreciate its straightforward Chrome plugin and intuitive interface, which allows for quick and easy demo creation. Many reviewers highlight its ability to improve efficiency, collaboration, and productivity, making it a valuable tool for both personal and professional use. The platform's features, such as Playlist, Lead Forms, and Analytics, are noted for enhancing user engagement and providing valuable insights. Overall, Layerpath is highly recommended for its ease of use and functionality.

results.title: Supademo Reviews (2026) - Product Hunt
results.content:
4.9

Based on 29 reviews

Review Supademo?

Reviewers consistently say Supademo is fast and easy to use, letting them build interactive demos in minutes and update or embed them without much effort. They use it across sales, onboarding, support, help docs, training, and website demos, often noting that prospects and customers respond well to the interactive format. Support and responsiveness from the team also come up repeatedly. Criticism is limited, but one reviewer says some editing controls are not very intuitive and wants clearer options for highlighting clickable buttons.

Faces is a total game changer for me. It’s such a clean, complete solution to something I used to cobble together with multiple tools — Notion, Google Slides, Canva, even Framer. What I love most is how intuitive it is, without sacrificing complexity or the quality of the final output. Faces strikes that rare balance between power and simplicity. Huge thanks for building this.

My overall experience of using GoIt LMS is super positive! There are three things that I like mostly. The first one is the ability to track and follow your progress, which helps me to feel more motivated during study!🤓🔥 The second one is plain, intuitively understandable design💻 I find especially attractive and cute the cat on the main page, that changes its mood depended on the amount of time, which you spend on study😻 And the third one of course is online-code-battles with other students - perfect way to master your skills😎 So GoIt LMS is a great E-learning platform for beginner programmers🔥👍
